questions: What LinkedIn Ads benchmarks should B2B marketers expect?
How to apply LinkedIn benchmark insights to planning?
qa.answer: Benchmarks report ranges for CPM, CPC, CTR, and CPL by segment and objective. Results vary widely by audience quality, offer, and creative. Use for sanity checks and forecasting ranges.
implication: Target tight ICP audiences; test offers (content vs. demo) and formats.
Optimize creative for feed consumption; rotate to prevent fatigue.
Monitor downstream SQO/CAC, not just upper‑funnel rates.
